raw_consumer_statement:
I had a Citi XXXX credit card and noticed unauthorized charges that I did not make. I reported the fraud multiple times to Citi and filed several disputes. Citi replaced my card multiple times, but unauthorized charges continued to appear. Because the fraud kept happening, I eventually closed the account. 
Even after closing the account, I am still receiving billing statements and emails asking me to pay a balance of {$4600.00}. This balance includes charges that I previously reported as fraudulent. I no longer have access to the mobile app/account, which makes it difficult to review details. 
I am requesting that Citi review all previous fraud reports and disputes, remove unauthorized charges and related interest/fees, and stop attempting to collect payment for charges I did not authorize.
